title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
